examples: Spiders do not take well to farming, and as they are mostly teeny little creatures, they don't produce enough silk to be useful in large-scale production.
I'll tackle that teeny, tiny problem in my column next week.
Secretly he'll freak out if you take him to Ruth's Chris, even just the one teeny time.
Phil Jones may be right: it could be going up a teeny weeny bit.
Or he could be wrong: it could be going down a teeny weeny bit.
